headlineSummary: Anthropic drew the clearest positive reaction on limited evidence, while OpenAI looked mixed and Google Gemini skewed negative, with the Gemini/Claude benchmark comparison especially stark [E1][E2][E3][E4][E5].

ranking.summary: Google Gemini drew negative sentiment on limited evidence, mainly from a comment contrasting its benchmark result unfavorably with Claude’s much better score [E1].
OpenAI came through as mixed on limited evidence: one comment called Whisper a solid local transcription option, while another criticized a shift in stated values [E4][E5].
Anthropic was viewed positively, with comments praising Claude for meeting specifications, helping with coding work, and even taking the lead in explaining the task flow [E1][E2][E3].

evidence.excerpt: Claude at 1.3% and Gemini at 71.4% is quite the range

annotations.rationale: The comment explicitly names Claude, and in the story's benchmark context a 1.3% ethical-violation rate is favorable.
The comment explicitly names Gemini, and in the story's benchmark context a 71.4% ethical-violation rate is a very poor result.

evidence.excerpt: I then feed it to Claude, and watch it meet my every specification, I can then test it, note any bugs, recompile and re-test.

annotations.rationale: The commenter explicitly says Claude meets 'my every specification' in a coding workflow, which is strong praise of capability.

evidence.excerpt: Just last night I worked with Claude and at the end of the evening I had it explain to me what we actually did. It was a "Her" (as in the movie) moment for me where the AI was now handholding me and not the other way around.

annotations.rationale: The commenter describes Claude as effectively leading and explaining the work, conveying strong admiration for its capability.

evidence.excerpt: OpenAI's Whisper is still a solid local transcription option.

annotations.rationale: The comment explicitly praises OpenAI's Whisper as a 'solid' transcription option.

evidence.excerpt: Just like how OpenAI changed their “constitution” about working with others.

annotations.rationale: The commenter cites OpenAI as an example of a company not sticking to its stated values, which is a criticism of trustworthiness.
